title: JS hydration mismatch error in custom code component
symptom: The chart does not display in the editor and shows a hydration error in the console after publishing.
applies_when: Using custom code for rendering charts
not_this_if: Chart displays correctly without hydration errors
Using standard WeWeb components without custom code
root_cause: The hydration mismatch error occurs when the server-rendered HTML does not match the client-rendered HTML. This can happen when dynamic content is rendered differently on the server and client, especially when using custom scripts or libraries like D3.
fix_steps: Move the custom code into a dedicated custom code component
Disable hydration for the section containing the chart
agent_instruction: Move your chart rendering code to a separate custom code component and disable hydration for that section.
